name: oms:cleanup
command:
Load the "cleanup" skill by calling the `skill-execute` tool with `{ "skill": "oms/cleanup" }`, then follow the skill's SKILL.md instructions to detect and clean up AI-generated redundant or low-quality code in the target below.

## Target

$ARGUMENTS
description: 检测并清理 AI 生成的冗余或低质量代码。用法: /oms:cleanup <目标文件/目录/范围>
